title: New! On-Demand Courses
body:
New! On-Demand Courses

 Discover our collection of new on-demand courses designed to keep you informed, skilled, and competitive. We continuously update our catalog so you always have access to the most relevant, timely content on both established risks and emerging trends in insurance and risk management.

Learn your way with the CEU web app: start a course on your laptop and finish it anytime, anywhere on your phone or tablet.

New courses launch often, so check back regularly to stay ahead of the curve!

Explore our latest options and start learning and earning CE today!

Insurance Ethics Essentials

Strategic Risk Financing: Self-Insurance and Captive Options
